title: Ripple brings RLUSD stablecoin to Turkey
snippet: Ripple, the leading provider of blockchain-based enterprise solutions across traditional and digital finance, today announced that its enterprise-grade, USD-backed stablecoin Ripple USD (RLUSD) is now available to institutions in Türkiye through three new partnerships with BiLira, Bitexen and Bitlo.

title: KBank and Ant International turn to JPMorgan's Kinexys for real-time cross-border USD
message_html: KBank and Ant International turn to JPMorgan's Kinexys for real-time cross-border USD ...
snippet: Kasikornbank has signed an MoU with Ant International to deploy blockchain rails for cross-border US Dollar transactions.

title: Three in five Mastercard e-commerce transactions in Europe now tokenized
message_html: Three in five Mastercard e-commerce transactions in Europe now tokenized ...
snippet: Mastercard is advancing the transformation of online checkout across Europe, building momentum toward its 2030 goal of phasing out manual card entry and reducing reliance on static credentials.

title: MoneyGram Debuts MGUSD Stablecoin to Expand Blockchain Payments
message_html: MoneyGram Debuts MGUSD Stablecoin to Expand Blockchain Payments ...
snippet: MoneyGram has launched its own stablecoin as it builds its blockchain payments infrastructure. The native U.S. dollar coin, MGUSD, is designed less for crypto natives than for people who need to move money but don’t have access to traditional financial services, MoneyGram said in a news release Tues
